title: GeneWiz sequencing
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"17cd8","text":"Mini-prepped or purified plasmids","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8aphk","text":"Sequencing primers (see specific protocol for primer sequences)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":20,"length":42}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5lk5d","text":"RNAse free water (Quality Biological, #351-029-721)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"m5v7","text":"0.2 mL PCR tubes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7uarl","text":"1.5 mL eppendorf tubes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare an appropriate concentration of template DNA (purified or mini-prepped) according to GeneWiz recommendations by diluting with RNAse free water (need 10 µL total volume per reaction) in a 1.5 mL eppendorf tube. Example: For forward (1) and reverse (2) sequencing/reactions, you will need 20 µL total diluted template.
Prepare a 25 picomolar solution of your primer(s) by diluting with RNAse free water (need at least 5 µL total volume per reaction).
Add 10 µL of diluted DNA + 5 µL of 25 pmol primer to a 0.2 mL PCR tube (1 primer for each reaction in each tube). Mix by pipetting up and down.
Place the tube(s) in a sealed plastic bag along with the printed sheet from submitting the plasmids for sequencing, obtained on the GeneWiz website .
Drop the plastic bag containing the reaction tubes and printed sheet at a GeneWiz drop off location.
creator: Jailyn Izu
